en.extract:
The small niltava (Niltava macgrigoriae) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae, native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia.  It is found in Bangladesh, Bhutan, India, Laos, Myanmar, Nepal, Thailand, Tibet and Vietnam. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.


Taxonomy and systematics


Subspecies
N. m. macgrogoriae - (Burton, 1836): The nominate subspecies, found in the central and western Himalayas from Uttarakhand to Sikkim and West Bengal.
N. m. signata - (McClelland, 1840): Found in Northeast India, Myanmar, southern China, north Thailand, and continental Southeast Asia. Non-breeding individuals are also found in coastal Guangdong. Males tend to have a greyer belly and underside than the nominate.


Behaviour and ecology


Diet
Eats small invertebrates and fruits.


Gallery


References

The '''small niltava''' ('''''Niltava macgrigoriae''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Muscicapidae]], native to the [[Indian subcontinent]] and [[Southeast Asia]].  It is found in [[Bangladesh]], [[Bhutan]], [[India]], [[Laos]], [[Myanmar]], [[Nepal]], [[Thailand]], [[Tibet]] and [[Vietnam]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.

== Taxonomy and systematics ==

=== Subspecies ===

* ''N. m. macgrogoriae'' - <small>([[Edward Burton (zoologist)|Burton]], 1836)</small>: The [[Nominate race|nominate]] subspecies, found in the central and western [[Himalayas]] from [[Uttarakhand]] to [[Sikkim]] and [[West Bengal]].
* ''N. m. signata'' - <small>(McClelland, 1840)</small>: Found in [[Northeast India]], [[Myanmar]], southern [[China]], north [[Thailand]], and [[Mainland Southeast Asia|continental Southeast Asia]]. Non-breeding individuals are also found in coastal [[Guangdong]]. Males tend to have a greyer belly and underside than the nominate.<ref name=":0">{{Cite journal|last=Clement|first=Peter|date=2020-03-04|title=Small Niltava (Niltava macgrigoriae)|url=https://birdsoftheworld.org/bow/species/smanil1/cur/introduction|journal=Birds of the World|language=en}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|title=ITIS Standard Report Page: Niltava macgrigoriae|url=https://www.itis.gov/servlet/SingleRpt/SingleRpt?search_topic=TSN&search_value=561621#null|access-date=2020-10-28|website=www.itis.gov}}</ref>

== Behaviour and ecology ==

=== Diet ===
Eats small invertebrates and fruits.<ref name=":0" />

zh.extract:
小仙鶲（学名：Niltava macgrigoriae）为鶲科仙鶲属的鸟类。该物种的模式产地在喜马拉雅山脉。


亚种
小仙鶲西南亚种（学名：Niltava macgrigoriae signata）。在中国大陆，分布于西藏、云南、贵州、广西、广东等地。该物种的模式产地在印度。
